> ⚠️ **Privacy first:** never paste real phone numbers, chat content, API keys,
> or `.env` contents. Redact everything with placeholders (e.g. `+55 11 9****`).

A clear description of what's wrong.

1. …
2. …
3. …

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include relevant log lines — **metadata only, no chat
text**).
